rationale.R1.4: Novelty claim is strong, but not fully supported by the text; agent output score reflects this.
rationale.R1.7: Citation and scholarship are lacking; no clear engagement with prior work or relevant literature.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is partial; some claims are flagged as uncertain, but others are presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is mostly within scope, but there is one minor drift in the domain list.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not fully addressed; some potential regressions or errors are mentioned, but not thoroughly examined.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability could be improved; some non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason.
